example_sentence_en: Adolescence is a period of rapid physical and emotional changes.
example_sentence_cn: 青春期是一段身心快速变化的时期。

example_sentence_en: Many teenagers face peer pressure at school.
example_sentence_cn: 许多青少年在学校面临同辈压力。

example_sentence_en: The campus is beautifully decorated with flowers in spring.
example_sentence_cn: 春天，校园里用鲜花装饰得非常美丽。

example_sentence_en: He scheduled his time carefully to balance study and play.
example_sentence_cn: 他仔细安排时间以平衡学习和玩耍。
inflection: 动词变化: schedules / scheduled / scheduling; 复数: schedules

example_sentence_en: She has excellent academic performance in all subjects.
example_sentence_cn: 她在所有学科上都有优异的学术表现。

example_sentence_en: Learning to manage stress is important for teenagers.
example_sentence_cn: 学会管理压力对青少年很重要。
inflection: 动词变化: stresses / stressed / stressing

example_sentence_en: He felt a lot of anxiety before the final exam.
example_sentence_cn: 他在期末考试前感到非常焦虑。

example_sentence_en: She gets along well with her peers.
example_sentence_cn: 她和同龄人相处得很好。

example_sentence_en: He volunteers at the local library every weekend.
example_sentence_cn: 他每个周末在本地图书馆做志愿者。
inflection: 动词变化: volunteers / volunteered / volunteering; 复数: volunteers

example_sentence_en: Colleges value students who participate in extracurricular activities.
example_sentence_cn: 大学看重参加课外活动的学生。

example_sentence_en: Moving to a new school was a big challenge for her.
example_sentence_cn: 转到新学校对她来说是个巨大的挑战。
inflection: 动词变化: challenges / challenged / challenging; 复数: challenges

example_sentence_en: It took him a while to adapt to the new environment.
example_sentence_cn: 他花了一段时间才适应新环境。
inflection: 动词变化: adapts / adapted / adapting

example_sentence_en: She has become much more mature over the past year.
example_sentence_cn: 在过去一年里她变得成熟多了。
inflection: 比较级: maturer | 最高级: maturest

example_sentence_en: College life helps students develop independence.
example_sentence_cn: 大学生活帮助学生培养独立性。

example_sentence_en: Teenagers are trying to find their own identities.
example_sentence_cn: 青少年正试图寻找他们自己的身份认同。

example_sentence_en: There is sometimes a conflict between parents and teenagers.
example_sentence_cn: 父母和青少年之间有时会有冲突。
inflection: 动词变化: conflicts / conflicted / conflicting; 复数: conflicts

example_sentence_en: A good teacher knows how to motivate students.
example_sentence_cn: 一位好老师知道如何激励学生。
inflection: 动词变化: motivates / motivated / motivating

example_sentence_en: I find it hard to concentrate in a noisy room.
example_sentence_cn: 我发现在嘈杂的房间里很难集中注意力。
inflection: 动词变化: concentrates / concentrated / concentrating

example_sentence_en: You need to balance your work and rest.
example_sentence_cn: 你需要平衡工作和休息。
inflection: 动词变化: balances / balanced / balancing

example_sentence_en: We have four exams at the end of this semester.
example_sentence_cn: 这学期末我们有四门考试。

example_sentence_en: The school has added computer programming to its curriculum.
example_sentence_cn: 学校把计算机编程加入了它的课程中。

example_sentence_en: I need some guidance on choosing my major.
example_sentence_cn: 我在选择专业方面需要一些指导。

example_sentence_en: The school counselor helps students with their problems.
example_sentence_cn: 学校辅导员帮助学生解决问题。

example_sentence_en: He is under a lot of pressure to succeed.
example_sentence_cn: 他承受着要取得成功的巨大压力。

example_sentence_en: She overcame her fear of public speaking.
example_sentence_cn: 她克服了公开演讲的恐惧。
inflection: 动词变化: overcomes / overcame / overcoming

example_sentence_en: He is confident that he will pass the test.
example_sentence_cn: 他自信能通过考试。
inflection: 比较级: more confident | 最高级: most confident

example_sentence_en: She is a responsible student who always finishes her homework.
example_sentence_cn: 她是一个总是完成作业的负责任的学生。
inflection: 比较级: more responsible | 最高级: most responsible

example_sentence_en: Self-discipline is essential for success in high school.
example_sentence_cn: 自律对高中的成功至关重要。

example_sentence_en: We need a new strategy for learning English.
example_sentence_cn: 我们需要一个学习英语的新策略。

example_sentence_en: Every student has the potential to achieve great things.
example_sentence_cn: 每个学生都有取得伟大成就的潜力。

example_sentence_en: She has made great progress in math this term.
example_sentence_cn: 这学期她在数学方面取得了巨大进步。
inflection: 动词变化: progresses / progressed / progressing

example_sentence_en: Volunteering can be a very rewarding experience.
example_sentence_cn: 做志愿者可以是一段非常有意义的经历。

example_sentence_en: He felt awkward when he forgot her name.
example_sentence_cn: 当他忘了她的名字时，他感到很尴尬。
inflection: 比较级: more awkward | 最高级: most awkward

example_sentence_en: I feel like I belong to this community.
example_sentence_cn: 我觉得我属于这个社区。
inflection: 动词变化: belongs / belonged / belonging

example_sentence_en: The transition from junior high to senior high is challenging.
example_sentence_cn: 从初中到高中的过渡是具有挑战性的。

example_sentence_en: Resilience helps teenagers bounce back from failures.
example_sentence_cn: 韧性帮助青少年从失败中恢复过来。

example_sentence_en: A proactive student always prepares for lessons in advance.
example_sentence_cn: 积极主动的学生总是提前预习功课。

example_sentence_en: The students are enthusiastic about the upcoming trip.
example_sentence_cn: 学生们对即将到来的旅行充满热情。
inflection: 比较级: more enthusiastic | 最高级: most enthusiastic

example_sentence_en: She is fluent in both English and French.
example_sentence_cn: 她英语和法语都很流利。
inflection: 比较级: more fluent | 最高级: most fluent

example_sentence_en: He speaks English with a strong southern accent.
example_sentence_cn: 他说英语带有很重的南方口音。

example_sentence_en: There are many different dialects in China.
example_sentence_cn: 中国有许多不同的方言。

example_sentence_en: Reading is a good way to expand your vocabulary.
example_sentence_cn: 阅读是扩大词汇量的好方法。

example_sentence_en: English grammar can be quite difficult for beginners.
example_sentence_cn: 英语语法对初学者来说可能相当难。

example_sentence_en: It is important to express your feelings clearly.
example_sentence_cn: 清楚地表达你的感受很重要。
inflection: 动词变化: expresses / expressed / expressing

example_sentence_en: I couldn't comprehend what he was trying to say.
example_sentence_cn: 我无法理解他试图说什么。
inflection: 动词变化: comprehends / comprehended / comprehending

example_sentence_en: Please translate this sentence into Chinese.
example_sentence_cn: 请把这个句子翻译成中文。
inflection: 动词变化: translates / translated / translating

example_sentence_en: She is a native speaker of Japanese.
example_sentence_cn: 她的母语是日语。

example_sentence_en: Growing up in a bilingual environment is beneficial.
example_sentence_cn: 在双语环境中成长是有益的。

example_sentence_en: We can communicate with people from all over the world online.
example_sentence_cn: 我们可以在网上与来自世界各地的人交流。
inflection: 动词变化: communicates / communicated / communicating

example_sentence_en: The origin of this language dates back to centuries ago.
example_sentence_cn: 这种语言的起源可以追溯到几个世纪前。

example_sentence_en: Her pronunciation of French words is excellent.
example_sentence_cn: 她法语单词的发音非常棒。

example_sentence_en: Pay attention to your intonation when asking questions.
example_sentence_cn: 问问题时要注意你的语调。

example_sentence_en: You can guess the meaning from the context.
example_sentence_cn: 你可以从上下文猜测词义。

example_sentence_en: She studies English literature at university.
example_sentence_cn: 她在大学学习英国文学。

example_sentence_en: Learn some useful phrases before you travel abroad.
example_sentence_cn: 出国旅行前学一些有用的短语。

example_sentence_en: "Break a leg" is a common English idiom.
example_sentence_cn: “Break a leg”是一个常见的英语习语。

example_sentence_en: Teenagers often use slang when talking to each other.
example_sentence_cn: 青少年互相交谈时经常使用俚语。

example_sentence_en: You should write a formal letter to the principal.
example_sentence_cn: 你应该给校长写一封正式的信。
inflection: 比较级: more formal | 最高级: most formal

example_sentence_en: This is an informal gathering, so wear casual clothes.
example_sentence_cn: 这是一个非正式的聚会，所以穿休闲装吧。
inflection: 比较级: more informal | 最高级: most informal

example_sentence_en: He articulated his ideas clearly during the debate.
example_sentence_cn: 他在辩论中清晰地表达了他的想法。
inflection: 动词变化: articulates / articulated / articulating

example_sentence_en: Every child should be computer literate today.
example_sentence_cn: 今天每个孩子都应该具备计算机素养。
inflection: 比较级: more literate | 最高级: most literate

example_sentence_en: Fluency in a foreign language takes years of practice.
example_sentence_cn: 外语的流利需要多年的练习。

example_sentence_en: A certificate of English proficiency is required for the job.
example_sentence_cn: 这份工作需要英语精通证书。

example_sentence_en: Language can be a barrier to communication.
example_sentence_cn: 语言可能成为沟通的障碍。

example_sentence_en: She had to interpret for the foreign guests.
example_sentence_cn: 她不得不为外宾做口译。
inflection: 动词变化: interprets / interpreted / interpreting

example_sentence_en: It takes time to understand the nuances of a language.
example_sentence_cn: 理解一种语言的细微差别需要时间。

example_sentence_en: The dialogue in the movie was very funny.
example_sentence_cn: 电影里的对话非常有趣。

example_sentence_en: We debated on the topic of school uniforms.
example_sentence_cn: 我们就校服的话题进行了辩论。
inflection: 动词变化: debates / debated / debating; 复数: debates

example_sentence_en: I persuaded my parents to let me go on the trip.
example_sentence_cn: 我说服了父母让我去旅行。
inflection: 动词变化: persuades / persuaded / persuading

example_sentence_en: Words cannot convey how happy I am.
example_sentence_cn: 言语无法传达我有多开心。
inflection: 动词变化: conveys / conveyed / conveying

example_sentence_en: Are you implying that I am wrong?
example_sentence_cn: 你在暗示我错了吗？
inflection: 动词变化: implies / implied / implying

example_sentence_en: Children acquire their first language naturally.
example_sentence_cn: 儿童自然地习得他们的第一语言。
inflection: 动词变化: acquires / acquired / acquiring

example_sentence_en: The best way to learn a language is to immerse yourself in it.
example_sentence_cn: 学习语言最好的方法就是沉浸其中。
inflection: 动词变化: immerses / immersed / immersing

example_sentence_en: Paris is a popular tourist destination.
example_sentence_cn: 巴黎是一个受欢迎的旅游目的地。

example_sentence_en: We booked our accommodation online before the trip.
example_sentence_cn: 我们在旅行前在网上预订了住处。

example_sentence_en: Please keep your luggage with you at all times.
example_sentence_cn: 请随时保管好你的行李。

example_sentence_en: Our travel agent planned a detailed itinerary for us.
example_sentence_cn: 我们的旅行社为我们规划了详细的行程。

example_sentence_en: We went on an excursion to the mountains last weekend.
example_sentence_cn: 上周末我们去山区远足了。

example_sentence_en: We spent the whole day exploring the ancient city.
example_sentence_cn: 我们花了一整天探索这座古城。
inflection: 动词变化: explores / explored / exploring

example_sentence_en: The voyage across the Pacific took three weeks.
example_sentence_cn: 横跨太平洋的航行花了三周时间。

example_sentence_en: The scenery along the river is breathtaking.
example_sentence_cn: 沿河的风景令人叹为观止。

example_sentence_en: I bought a small souvenir for my sister.
example_sentence_cn: 我给妹妹买了一件小纪念品。

example_sentence_en: Don't forget to bring your passport to the airport.
example_sentence_cn: 别忘了带护照去机场。

example_sentence_en: The departure time of the flight has been delayed.
example_sentence_cn: 航班的出发时间延误了。

example_sentence_en: They went on an expedition to the North Pole.
example_sentence_cn: 他们去北极探险了。

example_sentence_en: I read the guidebook to find good restaurants.
example_sentence_cn: 我看了旅游指南来找好餐厅。

example_sentence_en: We stayed at a beautiful beach resort.
example_sentence_cn: 我们住在一个美丽的海滩度假胜地。

example_sentence_en: Public transport in this city is very convenient.
example_sentence_cn: 这座城市的公共交通非常方便。
inflection: 动词变化: transports / transported / transporting

example_sentence_en: The landscape of the countryside is very peaceful.
example_sentence_cn: 乡村的风景非常宁静。

example_sentence_en: We wandered around the old town for hours.
example_sentence_cn: 我们在老城区漫步了几个小时。
inflection: 动词变化: wanders / wandered / wandering

example_sentence_en: We trekked through the jungle for two days.
example_sentence_cn: 我们在丛林中跋涉了两天。
inflection: 动词变化: treks / trekked / trekking

example_sentence_en: They went on a cruise down the Nile River.
example_sentence_cn: 他们乘船游览了尼罗河。
inflection: 动词变化: cruises / cruised / cruising; 复数: cruises

example_sentence_en: We will board the plane in an hour.
example_sentence_cn: 我们一小时后登机。
inflection: 动词变化: boards / boarded / boarding

example_sentence_en: You need a visa to enter the country.
example_sentence_cn: 你需要签证才能进入该国。

example_sentence_en: The village is in a remote area of the mountains.
example_sentence_cn: 这个村庄位于山区一个偏远的地方。
inflection: 比较级: remoter | 最高级: remotest

example_sentence_en: She loves to travel and see exotic plants.
example_sentence_cn: 她喜欢旅行去看异国植物。

example_sentence_en: We took a scenic route to the coast.
example_sentence_cn: 我们走了一条风景优美的路线去海岸。

example_sentence_en: The Eiffel Tower is a famous landmark in Paris.
example_sentence_cn: 埃菲尔铁塔是巴黎著名的地标。

example_sentence_en: The view from the top of the mountain was spectacular.
example_sentence_cn: 从山顶看到的景色非常壮观。

example_sentence_en: The sunset over the ocean was breathtaking.
example_sentence_cn: 海上的日落令人叹为观止。

example_sentence_en: We visited a picturesque village by the lake.
example_sentence_cn: 我们参观了湖边一个风景如画的村庄。

example_sentence_en: The hotel is located in a tranquil setting.
example_sentence_cn: 酒店坐落在宁静的环境中。
inflection: 比较级: more tranquil | 最高级: most tranquil

example_sentence_en: The bustling market was full of tourists.
example_sentence_cn: 熙熙攘攘的市场挤满了游客。

example_sentence_en: The city has a vibrant nightlife.
example_sentence_cn: 这座城市有充满生机的夜生活。

example_sentence_en: We spent the morning sightseeing in London.
example_sentence_cn: 我们一早在伦敦观光。

example_sentence_en: Traveling alone was a great adventure for him.
example_sentence_cn: 独自旅行对他来说是一次大冒险。

example_sentence_en: We will embark on a new journey tomorrow.
example_sentence_cn: 我们明天将开始一段新的旅程。
inflection: 动词变化: embarks / embarked / embarking

example_sentence_en: She plans to study abroad next year.
example_sentence_cn: 她计划明年出国留学。

example_sentence_en: His wanderlust made him travel to 50 countries.
example_sentence_cn: 他的漫游癖让他去了50个国家。

example_sentence_en: She is studying ecology to help protect the environment.
example_sentence_cn: 她正在学习生态学以帮助保护环境。

example_sentence_en: Wildlife conservation is very important for our planet.
example_sentence_cn: 野生动物保护对我们的星球非常重要。

example_sentence_en: The rainforest is known for its rich biodiversity.
example_sentence_cn: 雨林以其丰富的生物多样性而闻名。

example_sentence_en: We saw a lot of wildlife during our safari.
example_sentence_cn: 我们在狩猎旅行中看到了很多野生动物。

example_sentence_en: Polar bears are losing their habitat due to global warming.
example_sentence_cn: 由于全球变暖，北极熊正在失去它们的栖息地。

example_sentence_en: The island has unique flora and fauna.
example_sentence_cn: 这座岛屿拥有独特的动植物群。

example_sentence_en: The scientists studied the fauna of the region.
example_sentence_cn: 科学家们研究了该地区的动物群。

example_sentence_en: Climate change is a serious global issue.
example_sentence_cn: 气候变化是一个严重的全球性问题。

example_sentence_en: The glacier has been melting rapidly in recent years.
example_sentence_cn: 近年来冰川一直在迅速融化。

example_sentence_en: The Amazon is the largest rainforest in the world.
example_sentence_cn: 亚马逊是世界上最大的雨林。

example_sentence_en: The Sahara is a vast and hot desert.
example_sentence_cn: 撒哈拉是一个广阔而炎热的沙漠。

example_sentence_en: The volcano erupted after fifty years of silence.
example_sentence_cn: 这座火山在沉寂了五十年后喷发了。

example_sentence_en: The Qinghai-Tibet Plateau is known as the roof of the world.
example_sentence_cn: 青藏高原被称为世界屋脊。

example_sentence_en: A river flows through the beautiful valley.
example_sentence_cn: 一条河流穿过美丽的山谷。

example_sentence_en: We reached the peak of the mountain at noon.
example_sentence_cn: 我们在中午到达了山峰。

example_sentence_en: The ecosystem of the ocean is very delicate.
example_sentence_cn: 海洋的生态系统非常脆弱。

example_sentence_en: We need to find sustainable ways to live.
example_sentence_cn: 我们需要寻找可持续的生存方式。

example_sentence_en: Pandas are an endangered species.
example_sentence_cn: 熊猫是濒危物种。

example_sentence_en: The view of the mountains was truly magnificent.
example_sentence_cn: 山景确实非常壮丽。
inflection: 比较级: more magnificent | 最高级: most magnificent

example_sentence_en: We should preserve our natural resources.
example_sentence_cn: 我们应该保护我们的自然资源。
inflection: 动词变化: preserves / preserved / preserving

example_sentence_en: Dinosaurs have been extinct for millions of years.
example_sentence_cn: 恐龙已经灭绝了数百万年。

example_sentence_en: Air pollution is a serious problem in big cities.
example_sentence_cn: 空气污染是大城市的一个严重问题。

example_sentence_en: Solar energy is a type of renewable energy.
example_sentence_cn: 太阳能是一种可再生能源。

example_sentence_en: The terrain here is very rocky and steep.
example_sentence_cn: 这里的地形非常多岩石且陡峭。

example_sentence_en: The sheep were grazing in the meadow.
example_sentence_cn: 羊在草地上吃草。

example_sentence_en: They climbed up the steep cliff.
example_sentence_cn: 他们爬上了陡峭的悬崖。

example_sentence_en: The waterfall cascaded down into the pool below.
example_sentence_cn: 瀑布倾泻而下流入下方的水池。

example_sentence_en: Marine life is threatened by plastic waste.
example_sentence_cn: 海洋生物受到塑料废弃物的威胁。

example_sentence_en: He survived alone in the wilderness for a week.
example_sentence_cn: 他在荒野中独自生存了一周。

example_sentence_en: We discovered a pristine beach with white sand.
example_sentence_cn: 我们发现了一片有着白沙的原始海滩。

example_sentence_en: The majestic eagle soared through the sky.
example_sentence_cn: 雄伟的鹰在空中翱翔。
inflection: 比较级: more majestic | 最高级: most majestic

example_sentence_en: Plants thrive in this warm and wet climate.
example_sentence_cn: 植物在这种温暖潮湿的气候中茁壮成长。
inflection: 动词变化: thrives / thrived / thriving

example_sentence_en: Animals must evolve to survive changing environments.
example_sentence_cn: 动物必须进化才能在不断变化的环境中生存。
inflection: 动词变化: evolves / evolved / evolving

example_sentence_en: The Great Wall is an important cultural heritage site.
example_sentence_cn: 长城是一个重要的文化遗产地。

example_sentence_en: It is a tradition to eat mooncakes during the Mid-Autumn Festival.
example_sentence_cn: 在中秋节吃月饼是一个传统。

example_sentence_en: Every country has its own unique customs.
example_sentence_cn: 每个国家都有自己独特的习俗。

example_sentence_en: The Spring Festival is the most important holiday in China.
example_sentence_cn: 春节是中国最重要的节日。

example_sentence_en: The wedding ceremony was held in a beautiful garden.
example_sentence_cn: 婚礼仪式在一个美丽的花园里举行。

example_sentence_en: The actors wore traditional costumes for the performance.
example_sentence_cn: 演员们穿着传统服装进行表演。

example_sentence_en: French cuisine is famous all over the world.
example_sentence_cn: 法国菜闻名全世界。

example_sentence_en: The city is known for its modern architecture.
example_sentence_cn: 这座城市以其现代建筑闻名。

example_sentence_en: People of different religions live together peacefully here.
example_sentence_cn: 不同宗教的人们在这里和平共处。

example_sentence_en: He has a strong belief in justice.
example_sentence_cn: 他对正义有强烈的信念。

example_sentence_en: Cultural diversity makes our society richer.
example_sentence_cn: 文化多样性使我们的社会更丰富。

example_sentence_en: The writer left a rich literary legacy.
example_sentence_cn: 这位作家留下了丰富的文学遗产。

example_sentence_en: The museum displays many ancient artifacts.
example_sentence_cn: 博物馆展出许多古代文物。

example_sentence_en: We visited an art gallery last Sunday.
example_sentence_cn: 上周日我们参观了一家美术馆。

example_sentence_en: The story is part of local folklore.
example_sentence_cn: 这个故事是当地民间传说的一部分。

example_sentence_en: Immigrants often assimilate into the new culture.
example_sentence_cn: 移民通常会融入新文化。
inflection: 动词变化: assimilates / assimilated / assimilating

example_sentence_en: London is a multicultural city.
example_sentence_cn: 伦敦是一个多元文化的城市。

example_sentence_en: We ate authentic Italian pizza at the restaurant.
example_sentence_cn: 我们在餐厅吃了正宗的意大利披萨。
inflection: 比较级: more authentic | 最高级: most authentic

example_sentence_en: The tribe performs a special ritual before hunting.
example_sentence_cn: 部落打猎前会举行特殊的仪式。

example_sentence_en: His ancestors came to this country hundreds of years ago.
example_sentence_cn: 他的祖先几百年前来到这个国家。

example_sentence_en: She is a direct descendant of a famous poet.
example_sentence_cn: 她是一位著名诗人的直系后代。

example_sentence_en: Traditions are passed down from generation to generation.
example_sentence_cn: 传统代代相传。

example_sentence_en: We should respect the rights of indigenous people.
example_sentence_cn: 我们应该尊重土著人民的权利。

example_sentence_en: Ancient Greek myths are still popular today.
example_sentence_cn: 古希腊神话至今仍然很受欢迎。

example_sentence_en: He is a legend in the music industry.
example_sentence_cn: 他是音乐界的传奇。

example_sentence_en: The movie has a very compelling narrative.
example_sentence_cn: 这部电影的叙述非常引人入胜。

example_sentence_en: Local crafts are popular among tourists.
example_sentence_cn: 当地手工艺品很受游客欢迎。

example_sentence_en: Chinese embroidery is famous for its detail.
example_sentence_cn: 中国刺绣以其精细闻名。

example_sentence_en: She enjoys making pottery in her free time.
example_sentence_cn: 她空闲时喜欢做陶器。

example_sentence_en: The museum is exhibiting ancient Egyptian treasures.
example_sentence_cn: 博物馆正在展出古埃及宝藏。
inflection: 动词变化: exhibits / exhibited / exhibiting; 复数: exhibits

example_sentence_en: The cultural performance was amazing.
example_sentence_cn: 这场文化表演非常精彩。

example_sentence_en: The melody of this song is very beautiful.
example_sentence_cn: 这首歌的旋律非常优美。

example_sentence_en: I love the rhythm of African drums.
example_sentence_cn: 我喜欢非洲鼓的节奏。

example_sentence_en: It is good etiquette to say thank you.
example_sentence_cn: 说谢谢是良好的礼节。

example_sentence_en: Every culture has its own unique traditions.
example_sentence_cn: 每种文化都有自己独一无二的传统。

example_sentence_en: It is important to integrate into the local community.
example_sentence_cn: 融入当地社区很重要。
inflection: 动词变化: integrates / integrated / integrating

example_sentence_en: We live in a harmonious society.
example_sentence_cn: 我们生活在一个和谐的社会中。
inflection: 比较级: more harmonious | 最高级: most harmonious

example_sentence_en: We should show tolerance towards different cultures.
example_sentence_cn: 我们应该对不同的文化表现出宽容。

example_sentence_en: We should learn to appreciate other cultures.
example_sentence_cn: 我们应该学会欣赏其他文化。
inflection: 动词变化: appreciates / appreciated / appreciating
